prompt: A clean, minimal, modern 2D blank neutral board tile sprite for a mobile word puzzle game. Perfect square format. Rounded square tile shape with a neutral white-to-light-gray color base (completely grayscaled/white so it can be tinted in Unity UI). Completely blank, with no text, no letters, no numbers, and no symbols. Same shape, bevels, and style as the bonus tiles. Polished minimal satin-like surface with a subtle elegant soft drop shadow underneath. Clean flat vector style, centered composition, transparent background.
